linkedin.text: Just some .. not so small 1200WB members to get the year started. Working along side the Built team Gant and Sons completed the Drafting, Fabrication, Surface treatment, Delivery and Erection of approx 30t of steel for the first tower crane grillage assembly for the new Festival Tower 2 project. Looking forward to see this new Tower in the Adelaide sky line.
linkedin.personalisation_value: HIGH - mentions current project, partners, capabilities

linkedin.text: From all of us here at Gant and Sons, We want to wish everyone a very merry Christmas and safe new years. We thank you for the support in 2025 and look forward to an even busy 2026
Introducing RTL Trades 🚰🛠️ RTL Trades' Brisbane based Plumbers, Electricians, Handymen, Roofers, Carpenters and Builders have been servicing Brisbane & the Gold Coast for over 75 years.

cost_analysis.notes: Pricing is FLAT per API request, not per post returned
